name: Roadmap Burn Down Wave 0 - Triage And Prune
outcome_goal: Turn the cleaned roadmap into an execution-ready authority map before build work begins.

jobs.label: roadmap_keep_kill_reparent
jobs.prompt: Use the canonical Praxis operator surfaces, not markdown drift, to inspect the open roadmap. Produce a compact operator packet with four lists: keep active now, retire as stale, reparent or merge, and keep parked as future bet. Treat evidence, receipts, and current bug/heatmap authority as stronger than old roadmap prose. Do not mutate roadmap state in this job.

jobs.label: bug_evidence_readiness
jobs.prompt: Inspect the live bug triage packet and work assignment matrix. Classify the active work into evidence debt, stale projection, live defect, and implementation-ready. Return the top ten work items that should become proof-first burn-down jobs, with the authority domain, why it matters, and what evidence would prove done. Do not mutate bug state.

jobs.label: wave_dependency_check
jobs.prompt: Review the six-wave burn-down shape for dependency mistakes. The intended order is: triage/prune, validation foundation, gateway authority cleanup, public beta wedge, LLM request contract, deferred product quarantine. Identify anything that should not run yet, anything missing from earlier gates, and any write-scope collision risk. Do not mutate state.
